implemented_slice: Added migration 0006_model_activation_refresh_state with a global active scoring profile unique index.
Added active_analysis_contexts to persist the active profile, data snapshot, score snapshot, refresh token, generation and affected modules.
Added POST /v1/scoring/profiles/{profileVersionId}/activate with expected active profile conflict detection.
Added POST /v1/scoring/profiles/{profileVersionId}/rollback with the same expected-active and refresh-token stale-client guardrails.

Activation locks the current and target profile rows, creates a completed scoring_run snapshot, switches the active profile, updates active_analysis_contexts and writes operation_logs in one transaction.
Stale expected active profile requests return 409 and keep the previous active profile unchanged while logging a conflict result for activation and rollback action types.
Added a frontend API-first model-center activation adapter and controls that send expected_active_profile_version_id plus client_refresh_token to the transaction endpoint.
Added a model-center rollback control that reactivates the previous profile through the dedicated transactional rollback endpoint.

Added POST /v1/scoring/profiles online draft creation that validates weight keys, per-weight limits and weight_sum=1.0, writes an inactive scoring_profile_versions row, preserves the active analysis context and logs create_scoring_profile_version.
Added POST /v1/scoring/recompute to validate the active profile and refresh token before enqueueing a score_recompute job.
Score recompute requests reuse the existing background_jobs idempotency key contract and log success/conflict results through operation_logs.
Added POST /v1/data/snapshots/refresh to validate the active profile and refresh token before enqueueing a data_snapshot_refresh job.
Data snapshot refresh requests reuse the active-context idempotency key contract and log success/conflict results through operation_logs.

Added migration 0009_transactional_outbox and transactional outbox events for model.profile.activated, score.recompute.requested, score.snapshot.activated, data.snapshot.refresh.requested and data.snapshot.activated.
Added a model-center Recompute scores control that calls /v1/scoring/recompute with expected_active_profile_version_id and client_refresh_token.

Added a score_recompute worker handler that validates active context freshness, creates a completed scoring_run, writes score_results for relationship_fact_candidate, relationship, entity, event, industry and source_document objects, advances active_analysis_contexts.refresh_token and logs execute_score_recompute.

Added a data_snapshot_refresh worker handler that validates active context freshness, creates an active data_snapshot, supersedes the previous active snapshot for the same scope and record_mode, writes data.snapshot.activated and advances active_analysis_contexts.refresh_token.
Added config/model_profiles/supply-chain-v3.json as an inactive immutable candidate profile loaded by the PostgreSQL seed path.

Added live Playwright coverage that activates supply-chain-v3, observes a transaction-created scoring_run snapshot, checks stale refresh semantics and rolls back to balanced-v2 through FastAPI/PostgreSQL.
Added mock Playwright coverage for online draft creation -> activate -> stale refresh -> score recompute enqueue -> rollback.
Added apps.worker.app.main model_refresh_wake_contract metadata for score_recompute and data_snapshot_refresh supervisor filters.
Supervisor CLI summaries for model refresh job/event filters now bind A204/A205/A206/A209 and explicitly state that A209 4h/24h soak remains non-closed.

PostgreSQL integration coverage now executes score_recompute and data_snapshot_refresh through python -m apps.worker.app.main supervise, proving supervised wake can advance refresh tokens and leave outbox dispatch available without treating soak as complete.

npx --yes pnpm@11.8.0 --filter @eei/web exec playwright test --config=../../playwright.config.ts tests/e2e/state-contract.spec.ts -g "A204 and A205"
GitHub Actions EEI validation workflow Step 10 G2 PostgreSQL integration for supervised score_recompute/data_snapshot_refresh wake assertions
not_closed_scope: A204/A205 remain IN_PROGRESS until the supervised wake slice is remote-CI validated and release-manager/long-duration refresh evidence is current.
A209 4h/24h soak remains a separate background production-stability gate and is not completed by this worker wake evidence.
Formal source/legal/brand clearance and production relationship approval remain outside T1303.

latest_online_edit_ci_result.verified_scope: POST /v1/scoring/profiles creates an inactive draft through the public API, preserves active context before explicit activation, rejects invalid weights, activates the draft, enqueues score recompute and rolls back through PostgreSQL-backed integration plus browser/live FastAPI coverage.
